SubItem.Name: Input
SubItem.Comment: Input value

SubItem.Name: Input Error
SubItem.Comment: Input validation fails. E.g. antivalent inputs are reading implausible values. Check sensor and wiring.

SubItem.Name: Enable Antivalent Input Diagnostic
SubItem.Comment: Enable antivalent diagnostic on the inputs

Entry.Name: Channel 17 X01 Input Error
Entry.Comment: Input validation fails. E.g. antivalent inputs are reading implausible values. Check sensor and wiring.

Entry.Comment: Input validation fails. E.g. antivalent inputs are reading implausible values. Check sensor and wiring.

SubItem.Name: Input
SubItem.Comment: Input value

SubItem.Name: Wirebreak
SubItem.Comment: Minumum current is not reached

SubItem.Name: Power Supply Missing
SubItem.Comment: Input status is unknown, because the needed power supply is missing.

SubItem.Name: Overcurrent
SubItem.Comment: Output is drawing too much current

SubItem.Name: Overload
SubItem.Comment: Output is in thermal overload and switched off

SubItem.Name: Open Load
SubItem.Comment: Minumum current is not reached

SubItem.Name: Short to 24V
SubItem.Comment: Voltage is detected in off state

SubItem.Name: Output
SubItem.Comment: Output value of the digital output

SubItem.Name: Enable Wirebreak
SubItem.Comment: Enable wirebreak detection

SubItem.Name: Filter Time
SubItem.Comment: Enable and select the desired filter time

SubItem.Name: Detect Open Load in Off State
SubItem.Comment: Enable open load detection in off state

SubItem.Name: Detect Open Load in On State
SubItem.Comment: Enable open load detection in on state

SubItem.Name: Detect Short to 24V
SubItem.Comment: Enable short detection to supply

SubItem.Name: Use Output as Power Supply
SubItem.Comment: The output is switched on all the time, independend from process data and safe state

SubItem.Name: Safe State Behavior
SubItem.Comment: Defines the behaviour of the output in EtherCAT states below OP

SubItem.Name: Detect Open Load in Off State
Detect Open Load in On State
